name: Bananas Flambe
recipeIngredient: 2 ripe bananas (cut in half, then split lengthwise)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut 2 ripe bananas in half, then split them lengthwise.
2. Melt a few tablespoons of butter over medium heat. Add the brown sugar and stir.
3. Add the banana pieces to the pan. Cook until they are fairly warm and starting to soften (about 1 minute).
4. Flip the bananas and cook for an additional 30 seconds.
5. Add rum, dark if desired, to taste and swirl it in the pan.
6. Allow the mixture to thicken slightly, then remove from heat and serve.
